effects.effect: Add 1 [Boney] Vivosaur or [BareBones Brigade] card from your Deck to your Hand.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then you can rest a Vivosaur your Opponent controls.

effects.name: Boney Screech
effects.effect: Apply Sleep to the Defending Vivosaur.

effects.name: Boney Beguile
effects.effect: Deal 30 damage for each [Boney] Vivosaur in your Discard Pile with a different name.
